who: small business owners using Gusto for HR management
offer: For small business owners using Gusto processing 1–5 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in employee productivity. We automate the onboarding workflow instead of manual onboarding processes.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes for new hires
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small business owners
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding workflows
DM outreach to small business owners with demo video
Community forums for sharing HR management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based onboarding checklists and manual entry form
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
